x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Check-in data provides Now Assist WSD with confirmed occupancy signals beyond reservation intent. Without check-in data, AI occupancy analysis is based on reservations rather than actual attendance, leading to inaccurate space utilization insights.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservation"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No reservations found", finding: "No reservations found. Check-in configuration cannot be assessed." }; } var gaCheckin = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservation"); gaCheckin.addQuery("check_in_state", "awaiting_check_in"); gaCheckin.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaCheckin.query(); var awaiting = gaCheckin.next() ? parseInt(gaCheckin.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((awaiting / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of reservations use check-in (" + awaiting + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of reservations have check-in enabled. Now Assist WSD has occupancy confirmation data for accurate AI space utilization analysis." }; } else if (pct >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of reservations use check-in (target: 50%+). Now Assist WSD AI occupancy data will be based on reservations rather than confirmed attendance." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of reservations use check-in. Now Assist WSD AI occupancy analysis will be inaccurate without check-in confirmation data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable check-in requirements on reservable modules. Check-in data provides Now Assist WSD with confirmed occupancy signals for accurate AI space utilization analysis and ghost reservation detection.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cca
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Check-in data provides Now Assist WSD with confirmed occupancy signals beyond reservation intent. Without check-in data, AI occupancy analysis is based on reservations rather than actual attendance, leading to inaccurate space utilization insights.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Check-in Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservation"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No reservations found", finding: "No reservations found. Check-in configuration cannot be assessed." }; } var gaCheckin = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservation"); gaCheckin.addQuery("check_in_state", "awaiting_check_in"); gaCheckin.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaCheckin.query(); var awaiting = gaCheckin.next() ? parseInt(gaCheckin.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((awaiting / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of reservations use check-in (" + awaiting + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of reservations have check-in enabled. Now Assist WSD has occupancy confirmation data for accurate AI space utilization analysis." }; } else if (pct >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of reservations use check-in (target: 50%+). Now Assist WSD AI occupancy data will be based on reservations rather than confirmed attendance." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of reservations use check-in. Now Assist WSD AI occupancy analysis will be inaccurate without check-in confirmation data." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>WSD</module> <number>CHK0006229</number> <order>700</order> <remediation_guidance>Enable check-in requirements on reservable modules. Check-in data provides Now Assist WSD with confirmed occupancy signals for accurate AI space utilization analysis and ghost reservation detection.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cca</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
